hooks.command: mkdir -p "$HOME/.claude/knowledge-base/.session-logs" 2>/dev/null; find "$HOME/.claude/knowledge-base/.session-logs" -type f -mtime +7 -delete 2>/dev/null; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "LOVE-LETTER KB AVAILABLE: Before debugging any error or non-trivial problem, silently invoke the love-letter:ll skill with SEARCH to check if this has been solved before. If a match is found, surface it. After solving a tricky problem, suggest /ll save. At save time, read the session log at $HOME/.claude/knowledge-base/.session-logs/<session_id>.jsonl to compute actual elapsed minutes. KB index: $HOME/.claude/knowledge-base/KBINDEX.md"}}'
